author: PoutyJinx
OpenAI
install_msg: Thank you for installing SIN Server Hub. Load it with `[p]load sinserverhub`, then enable slash commands with `[p]slash enablecog sinserverhub` and `[p]slash sync`.
name: sin-server-hub-cog
short: SIN Corp game server hub for Red-DiscordBot.
description: A Red-DiscordBot cog for showing game server info, status, IP, password, workshop links, notes, join instructions, and restart pings.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores manually entered server information per guild, including server names, IPs, passwords, links, notes, and configured role/channel IDs. No personal user data is stored.
